004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack.DataType.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.math.*;
025import java.util.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
033
034/**
035 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link MsgPackParser}.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
039 * </ul>
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
042 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/MessagePackSupport">MessagePack Basics</a>
043
044 * </ul>
045 */
046@SuppressWarnings({
047   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
048   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
049   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
050   "resource"  // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
051})
052public class MsgPackParserSession extends InputStreamParserSession implements TokenReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
053
054   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
055   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
056
057   /**
058    * Builder class.
059    */
060   public static class Builder extends InputStreamParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
061
062      final boolean nativeMode;
063
064      /**
065       * Constructor
066       *
067       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
068       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
069       */
070      protected Builder(MsgPackParser ctx) {
071         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
072         this.nativeMode = ctx.isNativeMode();
073      }
074
075      @Override
076      public MsgPackParserSession build() {
077         return new MsgPackParserSession(this);
078      }
079
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Creates a new builder for this object.
084    *
085    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
086    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
087    * @return A new builder.
088    */
089   public static Builder create(MsgPackParser ctx) {
090      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
091   }
092
093   /**
094    * Maximum databind parse-recursion depth.
095    *
096    * <p>
097    * The databind {@link #parseAnything(ClassMeta, MsgPackInputStream, Object, BeanPropertyMeta) parseAnything}
098    * path recurses once per nesting level; this bound makes an adversarial deeply-nested document fail with a
099    * {@link ParseException} instead of a {@link StackOverflowError}.  The token-cursor path is iterative and
100    * unaffected.
101    */
102   private static final int MAX_PARSE_DEPTH = 1000;
103
104   private final boolean nativeMode;
105
106   private int parseDepth;
107
108   /**
109    * Constructor.
110    *
111    * @param builder The builder for this object.
112    */
113   protected MsgPackParserSession(Builder builder) {
114      super(builder);
115      this.nativeMode = builder.nativeMode;
116   }
117
118   /**
119    * Opens a low-level pull-parser cursor over a MessagePack document, bound to this live session.
120    *
121    * <h5 class='section'>Builder properties honored:</h5>
122    * <c>autoCloseStreams</c>, <c>unbuffered</c>.
123    *
124    * <h5 class='section'>Builder properties NOT honored:</h5>
125    * <c>listener</c>, <c>debugOutputLines</c>, <c>consumes</c>, swaps, {@code @Schema}.
126    *
127    * @param input The input.
128    * @return A new {@link MsgPackTokenReader}.
129    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
130    */
131   @SuppressWarnings({
132      "java:S2095" // ParserPipe lifecycle is transferred to the returned MsgPackTokenReader, which closes it via its own close(); the caller owns the cursor via try-with-resources.
133   })
134   @Override /* TokenReadable */
135   public TokenReader parseTokens(Object input) throws IOException {
136      var pipe = new ParserPipe(input, isDebug(), isAutoCloseStreams(), isUnbuffered(), null);
137      return new MsgPackTokenReader(pipe, this).setNativeMode(nativeMode);
138   }
139
140   /**
141    * Streaming array-element {@link RecordReader} backed by {@link MsgPackTokenReader}.
142    *
143    * <p>
144    * Memory is O(1) in the array length &mdash; the wrapper opens the outer MessagePack array via
145    * the token cursor and binds one element at a time, exactly mirroring the CBOR cursor.  The
146    * returned cursor reports {@link RecordReader#isStreaming()} == <jk>true</jk>.
147    *
148    * @param input The input.
149    * @return A new element-streamed {@link RecordReader}.
150    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
151    */
152   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
153   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
154      try {
155         return StreamingArrayRecord.reader(parseTokens(input));
156      } catch (ParseException e) {
157         throw new IOException(e);
158      }
159   }
160
161   /*
162    * Workhorse entry point.  Wraps {@link #parseAnything0} with a recursion-depth guard so that an
163    * adversarial deeply-nested document fails with a {@link ParseException} instead of a
164    * {@link StackOverflowError}.
165    */
166   <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<?> eType, MsgPackInputStream is, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
167      if (++parseDepth > MAX_PARSE_DEPTH) {
168         parseDepth--;
169         throw new ParseException(this, "Maximum parse depth exceeded ({0}).", MAX_PARSE_DEPTH);
170      }
171      try {
172         return parseAnything0(eType, is, outer, pMeta);
173      } finally {
174         parseDepth--;
175      }
176   }
177
178   /*
179    * Workhorse method.
180    */
181   @SuppressWarnings({
182      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
183      "java:S6541"  // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
184   })
185   private <T> T parseAnything0(ClassMeta<?> eType, MsgPackInputStream is, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
186
187      if (eType == null)
188         eType = object();
189      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
190      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
191      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
192      if (nn(builder))
193         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
194      else if (nn(swap))
195         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
196      else
197         sType = eType;
198
199      if (sType.isOptional())
200         return (T)o(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), is, outer, pMeta));
201
202      setCurrentClass(sType);
203
204      Object o = null;
205      DataType dt = is.readDataType();
206      var rawLength = is.readLength();
207      // G8: array32/map32/str32/bin32/ext32 lengths are 32-bit unsigned (up to 2^32-1); a value in
208      // [2^31, 2^32-1] would truncate to a negative int.  Java containers/arrays cannot exceed int range.
209      if (rawLength > Integer.MAX_VALUE)
210         throw new ParseException(this, "MessagePack length {0} exceeds the maximum supported size of {1}.", rawLength, Integer.MAX_VALUE);
211      int length = (int)rawLength;
212
213      if (dt != DataType.NULL) {
214         if (dt == BOOLEAN)
215            o = is.readBoolean();
216         else if (dt == INT)
217            o = is.readInt();
218         else if (dt == LONG) {
219            var l = is.readLong();
220            // G3: a uint64 above Long.MAX_VALUE comes back as a negative signed long.  Mirror the
221            // protobuf R5 cross-format decision: a long target keeps the raw bits, a BigInteger target
222            // carries the full unsigned magnitude (lossless widen).
223            if (is.isUint64() && sType.inner() == BigInteger.class)
224               o = new BigInteger(Long.toUnsignedString(l));
225            else
226               o = l;
227         } else if (dt == FLOAT)
228            o = is.readFloat();
229         else if (dt == DOUBLE)
230            o = is.readDouble();
231         else if (dt == STRING)
232            o = trim(is.readString());
233         else if (dt == BIN)
234            o = is.readBinary();
235         else if (dt == EXT)
236            // G1: always consume the ext payload (mirrors the token cursor) and surface it as byte[].
237            // Without this branch the payload bytes are left in the stream, desyncing the next element.
238            o = is.readBinary();
239         else if (dt == ARRAY && sType.isObject()) {
240            var jl = newGenericList();
241            for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
242               jl.add(parseAnything(object(), is, outer, pMeta));
243            o = jl;
244         } else if (dt == MAP && sType.isObject()) {
245            var jm = newGenericMap();
246            for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
247               jm.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, jm, pMeta));
248            o = cast(jm, pMeta, eType);
249         }
250
251         if (sType.isObject()) {
252            // Do nothing.
253         } else if (nn(builder) || sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
254            if (dt == MAP) {
255               BeanMap m = builder == null ? newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()) : toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
256               for (var i = 0; i < length; i++) {
257                  String pName = parseAnything(string(), is, m.getBean(false), null);
258                  var bpm = m.getPropertyMeta(pName);
259                  if (bpm == null) {
260                     if (pName.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
261                        parseAnything(string(), is, null, null);
262                     else
263                        onUnknownProperty(pName, m, parseAnything(string(), is, null, null));
264                  } else {
265                     var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) bpm.getBeanInfo();
266                     Object value = parseAnything(cm, is, m.getBean(false), bpm);
267                     setName(cm, value, pName);
268                     try {
269                        bpm.set(m, pName, value);
270                     } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
271                        onBeanSetterException(pMeta, e);
272                        throw e;
273                     }
274                  }
275               }
276               o = builder == null ? m.getBean() : builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType);
277            } else {
278               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
279            }
280         } else if (sType.isMap()) {
281            if (dt == MAP) {
282               Map m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
283               for (var i = 0; i < length; i++) {
284                  Object key = parseAnything(sType.getKeyType(), is, outer, pMeta);
285                  var vt = sType.getValueType();
286                  Object value = parseAnything(vt, is, m, pMeta);
287                  setName(vt, value, key);
288                  m.put(key, value);
289               }
290               o = m;
291            } else {
292               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
293            }
294         } else if (sType.isBoolean() || sType.isCharSequence() || sType.isChar() || sType.isNumber() || sType.isByteArray()) {
295            // Merged scalar tier: one wire-type (BOOLEAN/INT/LONG/FLOAT/DOUBLE/STRING/BIN) covers
296            // many scalar Java types — the read already happened above and convertToType narrows.
297            o = convertToType(o, sType);
298         } else if (sType.isDate()) {
299            o = parseDate(String.valueOf(o), sType);
300         } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
301            o = parseCalendar(String.valueOf(o), sType);
302         } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
303            o = parseTemporal(String.valueOf(o), sType);
304         } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
305            o = parseDuration(String.valueOf(o));
306         } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
307            o = parsePeriod(String.valueOf(o));
308         } else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer) && dt == STRING) {
309            o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, o == null ? "" : o.toString());
310         } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
311            if (dt == MAP) {
312               var m = newGenericMap();
313               for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
314                  m.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, m, pMeta));
315               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
316            } else if (dt == ARRAY) {
317               Collection l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance() : newGenericList());
318               for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
319                  l.add(parseAnything(sType.getElementType(), is, l, pMeta));
320               o = l;
321            } else {
322               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
323            }
324         } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
325            if (dt == MAP) {
326               var m = newGenericMap();
327               for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
328                  m.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, m, pMeta));
329               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
330            } else if (dt == ARRAY) {
331               Collection l = (sType.isCollection() && sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance() : newGenericList());
332               for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
333                  l.add(parseAnything(sType.isArgs() ? sType.getArg(i) : sType.getElementType(), is, l, pMeta));
334               o = toArray(sType, l);
335            } else {
336               throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
337            }
338         } else if (dt == MAP) {
339            var m = newGenericMap();
340            for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
341               m.put((String)parseAnything(string(), is, outer, pMeta), parseAnything(object(), is, m, pMeta));
342            if (m.containsKey(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType)))
343               o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
344            else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler()))
345               o = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m).getBean();
346            else
347               throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason());
348         } else {
349            throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid data type {0} encountered for parse type {1}", dt, sType);
350         }
351      }
352
353      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
354         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
355
356      if (nn(outer))
357         setParent(eType, o, outer);
358
359      return (T)o;
360   }
361
362   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
363   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
364      try (MsgPackInputStream is = new MsgPackInputStream(pipe)) {
365         return parseAnything(type, is, getOuter(), null);
366      }
367   }
368}
